title: Brachiaria serrifolia
taxonomy: Brachiaria serrifolia is classified as a species of grass in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the subfamily Panicoideae and the tribe Paniceae. This classification makes it a member of the Poaceae family, commonly known as grasses. The genus Brachiaria is a group of grasses native to tropical and subtropical regions worldwide. The serrated leaves and stem characteristics of Brachiaria serrifolia contribute to its unique classification within the Poaceae family.
